message:
feat(animation): add spring physics system with presets (bd-3vbf.16)

Damped harmonic oscillator implementing the Animation trait. Semi-implicit
Euler integration with automatic dt subdivision for stability. Includes
5 presets (gentle, bouncy, stiff, critical, slow), impulse support, and
rest detection. 23 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
